name: Janmashtami
traditions: Fasting until midnight; Dahi Handi (human pyramids to break butter pots); devotional singing; theatrical enactments of Krishna's life (Ras Lila).
historicalBackground: Janmashtami celebrates the birth of Lord Krishna, the eighth avatar of Vishnu. According to tradition, Krishna was born at midnight in a prison in Mathura.
description: The birthday celebration of Lord Krishna, marked by midnight devotions, dramatic human pyramids, and joyous theatrical performances across India.
